spec_note: conditional_type per B13-CDL design §2 (SPEC edit DRAFT pending sign-off)

entries.label: A1
entries.title: Electroweak vacuum metastability
entries.unknown: Precise values of m_t(pole), alpha_s(M_Z), M_H (free SM parameters)
entries.dependency_mechanism: Sign of beta_lambda and zero-crossing scale of lambda(mu) set by top-Yukawa vs gauge balance; stability boundary linear in (m_t, alpha_s, M_H) near criticality

entries.label: A2
entries.title: Cosmological constant problem
entries.unknown: Origin/true value of vacuum energy; unknown cancellation mechanism
entries.dependency_mechanism: Additive vacuum contributions with no known cancellation; residual sets spacetime curvature

entries.label: A3
entries.title: Dark energy equation of state w(z)
entries.unknown: Whether w = -1 (Lambda) or evolves (w0, wa)
entries.dependency_mechanism: H(z) and distances integrate over w(z); w0-wa degeneracies
entries.contested_reason: DESI DR2 2.8-4.2 sigma evolving-DE hint is supernova-sample-dependent (Efstathiou 2025)

entries.label: A4
entries.title: Strong CP problem / theta-bar bound
entries.unknown: theta-bar in [0, 2pi), free superselection parameter
entries.dependency_mechanism: theta-bar multiplies topological G Gtilde term; all strong CP-odd observables scale with it; d_n = k * theta-bar with lattice k

entries.label: A5
entries.title: Triple-alpha / Hoyle-state fine-tuning
entries.unknown: Values of alpha_em and light quark masses setting the Hoyle resonance energy
entries.dependency_mechanism: Carbon yield ~ exp(-E_R/kT); NLEFT maps delta-E_R to delta-alpha, delta-m_q

entries.label: A6
entries.title: Hierarchy problem / naturalness
entries.unknown: UV completion / mechanism stabilizing the EW scale
entries.dependency_mechanism: delta-M_H^2 proportional to Lambda_UV^2; naturalness conditioned on cutoff and absence of fine cancellation

entries.label: A7
entries.title: Proton decay lifetime vs GUT-scale unknowns
entries.unknown: M_X, alpha_GUT, renormalization factor A_R
entries.dependency_mechanism: tau_p proportional to M_X^4 / alpha_GUT^2

entries.label: A8
entries.title: Neutrino ordering, Majorana phases, 0vbb, leptogenesis
entries.unknown: Mass ordering, delta_CP, two Majorana phases, absolute scale, Dirac vs Majorana
entries.dependency_mechanism: |m_ee| = |sum U_ei^2 m_i| phase-dependent; leptogenesis asymmetry from Im of Yukawa combinations

entries.label: A9
entries.title: Swampland conjectures (dS, distance)
entries.unknown: Truth of the conjectures and their O(1) constants c, alpha
entries.dependency_mechanism: EFT classes admitted/excluded conditional on unproven bounds

entries.label: A10
entries.title: Asymptotic-safety Higgs mass prediction
entries.unknown: Existence of gravitational UV fixed point; sign of A_lambda
entries.dependency_mechanism: A_lambda > 0 drives lambda(M_Pl)=0 giving M_H = 126 GeV

entries.label: A11
entries.title: Koide charged-lepton mass relation
entries.unknown: Whether the relation is law or coincidence; origin of Yukawas
entries.dependency_mechanism: K = (sum m)/(sum sqrt(m))^2 = 2/3 to 1e-5 with pole masses; not RG-invariant

entries.label: A12
entries.title: Varying constants and Dirac Large Numbers Hypothesis
entries.unknown: Whether G, alpha, mu = m_p/m_e drift in time or space
entries.dependency_mechanism: Cosmological/atomic results conditioned on constancy; LNH predicts Gdot/G ~ H_0
entries.contested_reason: Webb alpha-dipole (3.9 sigma) contested; lab bounds null

entries.label: A13
entries.title: Black hole information / unitarity of evaporation
entries.unknown: Planck-scale physics / UV completion
entries.dependency_mechanism: Page-curve unitarity conditional on unknown quantum-gravity dynamics

entries.label: A14
entries.title: Muon g-2 / hadronic vacuum polarization method dependence
entries.unknown: True value of a_mu^HVP,LO (data-driven vs lattice; CMD-3 vs prior e+e-)
entries.dependency_mechanism: SM prediction shifts by ~2.2e-9 swapping WP20 data-driven HVP for WP25 lattice HVP, flipping ~5 sigma tension to ~0.6 sigma agreement
entries.contested_reason: Method-dependent: dissolution of tension is conditional on lattice HVP; CMD-3 vs prior e+e- catalogue unresolved

entries.label: A15
entries.title: Hubble tension (early vs late H0)
entries.unknown: True H0 and the model connecting z~1100 to z=0 (missing physics vs systematics)
entries.dependency_mechanism: CMB H0 derived conditional on LCDM via sound horizon; ladder H0 conditional on Cepheid/TRGB calibration; ~5 sigma clash of conditional forward maps

entries.label: M1
entries.title: Riemann Hypothesis / GRH conditional family
entries.unknown: All nontrivial zeros of zeta / Dirichlet-Dedekind L on Re(s)=1/2
entries.dependency_mechanism: Zero-free regions control error terms via explicit formulae; GRH gives Miller witness bound 2(ln n)^2

entries.label: M2
entries.title: P vs NP / one-way functions / cryptographic hardness
entries.unknown: P vs NP; existence of OWFs; ETH
entries.dependency_mechanism: Security reductions: breaking scheme implies solving assumed-hard problem

entries.label: M3
entries.title: abc conjecture conditional family
entries.unknown: Truth of abc (and effective constants C_eps)
entries.dependency_mechanism: Radical bound implies Fermat-Catalan, Mordell (Elkies), Szpiro, Wieferich infinitude
entries.contested_reason: Mochizuki IUTT proof not accepted (Scholze-Stix gap at Cor 3.12)

entries.label: M4
entries.title: Schanuel conjecture conditional family
entries.unknown: Truth of Schanuel's conjecture
entries.dependency_mechanism: Macintyre-Wilkie: decidability of R_exp conditional on real Schanuel; algebraic independence of e, pi

entries.label: M5
entries.title: BSD conditional family / Tunnell congruent-number criterion
entries.unknown: Truth of (weak) BSD
entries.dependency_mechanism: Tunnell: A_n = 2 B_n ternary-form count equality decides congruence conditional on BSD; inequality direction unconditional

entries.label: M6
entries.title: Large cardinals / CH independence / projective determinacy
entries.unknown: Which extension of ZFC; size of the continuum
entries.dependency_mechanism: Regularity of definable sets equivalent to / follows from determinacy and large-cardinal axioms

entries.label: M7
entries.title: Undetermined constants: gamma, Chaitin Omega, Mills A, normality of pi/e
entries.unknown: Rationality of gamma; bits of Omega (uncomputable); Mills digits conditional on RH; normality of pi, e
entries.dependency_mechanism: Constants themselves are the unknowns on which downstream valuations condition
entries.contested_reason: Circulating gamma-irrationality preprints are unaccepted claims

entries.label: M8
entries.title: Twin prime / Goldbach / Collatz / Hodge conditional families
entries.unknown: The respective conjectures
entries.dependency_mechanism: Density, termination, and motive-theoretic results stated conditionally

entries.label: M9
entries.title: Langlands functoriality conditional family
entries.unknown: Functoriality for general L-group homomorphisms; Langlands reciprocity
entries.dependency_mechanism: Automorphy of sym^k controls L-function analyticity, hence Ramanujan/Selberg bounds; lifts compose along group homomorphisms
entries.contested_reason: Geometric case proven (2024); arithmetic case open - do not conflate

entries.label: M10
entries.title: Unique Games Conjecture hardness-of-approximation corollaries
entries.unknown: Truth of UGC (2-to-2 variant proven 2018)
entries.dependency_mechanism: UG seed hardness + noise-stability reductions fix exact thresholds: alpha_GW optimal for MAX-CUT, 2-eps vertex cover, Raghavendra universal SDP optimality; runs through PSD relaxations (Pos)
entries.contested_reason: Partial: 2-to-2 proven; UGC open, credence shifted
